title: Senior Software Engineer - Birlasoft International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Birlasoft International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
